data.title: Wire 3 Accelerates Georgia Expansion With $38M Warner Robins and Centerville Investment
data.description: A prominent fiber internet provider, Wire 3, revealed their strategy to extend their high-speed network to Warner Robins and Centerville in Georgia. With a substantial investment totaling $38 million, the expansion aims to provide improved internet services to about 38,000 residences and commercial establishments in Houston County. The company plans to commence construction soon and expects to start connecting customers shortly.

data.title: The Service Companies Chooses Fountain For Hiring Across 35 States With 24/7 Screening
data.description: In a recent development, The Service Companies has announced a partnership with Fountain, the AI-native frontline hiring platform. This collaboration aims to streamline recruiting, compliance processes, and onboarding procedures. The partnership seeks to leverage Fountain's innovative technology to enhance efficiency in these areas, ultimately benefiting the operations of The Service Companies.

data.title: Expensify's AI Expands to Expense Automation, Spend Insights, and Agents
data.description: In San Francisco, Expensify, Inc. (Nasdaq: EXFY) unveiled enhanced features for their Concierge AI platform. This update allows users to customize their Expensify accounts, automate expense-related activities, and assess expenditures using natural language via email, text, or within the Expensify app. The newly introduced functions consist of conversational analytics, permitting inquiries regarding spending based on employee, category, merchant, and workspace.

data.title: DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund Declares July 2026 Distribution
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on July 1, 2026, the DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund announced a distribution of $0.11 per share for July 2026, with shares traded on the NYSE under the symbol DSL. These distributions are subject to certain conditions.

data.title: Hitek Announces 1-for-25 Reverse Split
data.description: The information technology consulting and solutions provider, Hitek Global Inc. (Nasdaq: HKIT), based in Xiamen, China, disclosed plans to undergo a reverse split at a 1-for-25 ratio, scheduled to take place on July 6, 2026.

data.title: MetLife Investment Management Names Chris Aiken Head of Real Estate Equity Strategies
data.description: MetLife Investment Management (MIM), the institutional asset management arm of MetLife, Inc. (NYSE: MET), named Chris Aiken as the new head of Real Estate Equity Strategies in Whippnay, N.J. Aiken's appointment, effective immediately, reports to Andrea Drasites, the global head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance. Chris's role is crucial in the real estate division, showcasing strong leadership, extensive market knowledge, and unwavering dedication.

data.title: Sagard Real Estate Expands New Jersey Industrial Portfolio with Monmouth Junction Acquisition
data.description: Sagard Real Estate (SRE), a prominent real estate investment advisor in the U.S. and subsidiary of Sagard, a global multi-strategy asset management firm, revealed the purchase of 27 Distribution Way in Monmouth Junction, New Jersey. The industrial facility spans 223,977 square feet and is currently fully leased to a long-term distribution tenant. By acquiring this property, SRE is strengthening its footprint in Central New Jersey. The move demonstrates the company's ongoing strategic growth efforts in the region.

data.title: Lincoln Property Company Closes on The Edge Office Campus Outside Boston with J.P. Morgan Asset Management
data.description: In Boston, Lincoln Property Company, a global real estate firm, in collaboration with investors advised by J.P. Morgan Asset Management, has completed the acquisition of The Edge. This office campus, located in Wakefield, Massachusetts, comprises 962,000 square feet and is situated in a highly sought-after suburban submarket just north of Boston. The campus, consisting of seven buildings, presents a flexible layout with substantial value enhancement and opportunities for mixed-use redevelopment. Lincoln and its partner have strategic plans for executing further developments in this space.

data.title: ORYZON Raises €12 Million and Signs a Financing Agreement with COFIDES to Strengthen its Balance Sheet and Accelerate its Clinical Programs
data.description: Oryzon Genomics, S.A. reported the successful conclusion of a €12 million gross capital increase on July 1, 2026. The company issued 4,444,445 new ordinary shares at a subscription price of €2.70 each. This pricing signifies a 14.15% discount to the five-day volume-weighted average price of €3.1449 and a 12.68% discount to the June 30 closing price of €3.092 per share. The offering, structured as a capital increase without warrants, had Singular Bank as the placement agent in Spain and All-Invest in the EU and the UK. Banco Sabadell, S.A. served as the Agent Bank and Technical Pre-Financing Entity for the capital increase, with legal counsel provided by Gómez-Acebo & Pombo Abogados, S.L.P. Oryzon Genomics is a leading global player in epigenetics and a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company.

Sony has announced the discontinuation of physical disc-based game releases for PlayStation consoles from 2028 onwards. The company will fully transition to a digital format. All new games for PlayStation consoles will be available on the PlayStation Store and at retailers.

data.title: Limited Spec Automotive Welcomes the Rare 2026 Rolls-Royce Phantom MANSORY to Its Miami Showroom
data.description: A unique 2026 Rolls-Royce Phantom MANSORY has been recently showcased in the Miami showroom of Limited Spec Automotive, presenting a one-of-a-kind chance for luxury car fans and collectors. The ultra-luxury sedan, meticulously customized, is now available for viewing in Miami as of July 1, 2026. This limited edition vehicle in the showroom is a rare find, attracting those interested in exclusive automotive experiences.

data.title: Big Wave Center Opens, Creating New Opportunities for Adults with Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities in San Mateo County
data.description: Half Moon Bay campus in California has introduced a unique initiative that integrates housing, employment opportunities, education, health resources, and community engagement through collaborations with top nonprofit organizations. The project, established on July 1, 2026, marks a significant milestone in this endeavor, with over 25 years of planning and development. The campus aims to provide comprehensive support for individuals by offering a range of services that cater to their diverse needs and interests. Through strategic partnerships, the initiative strives to create a holistic environment that fosters personal growth, professional development, and social connections.

data.title: CentralSquare Launches CentralSquare One™, a Unified Intelligence Platform for Public Safety
data.description: In Lake Mary, Florida, CentralSquare Technologies, a prominent public sector software provider, has introduced CentralSquare One™, an integrated intelligence platform catering to the increasing data load encountered by public safety agencies. This innovative platform connects dispatch, records, AI-driven intelligence, and investigative processes into a cohesive interface. With public safety personnel facing the pressure of making swift critical decisions, CentralSquare One™ streamlines access to crucial information that is typically scattered across various systems. This unified platform aims to enhance operational efficiency and decision-making for professionals in the public safety sector.

data.title: Hanshow Energy Highlights Integrated Energy Solutions at Intersolar Europe 2026
data.description: During Intersolar Europe 2026 in Munich on July 1, 2026, Hanshow, a prominent digital retail solutions provider, showcased its Hanshow Energy division. The exhibit focused on integrated energy solutions tailored for commercial and industrial clients to enhance energy efficiency. Hanshow aimed to appeal to a wide audience and capitalize on potential business opportunities at the event.
